name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
use: Stable LLM security risk categories and mitigations.

name: MITRE ATLAS
use: Adversarial AI tactics, techniques, mitigations, and case studies.

name: NIST AI RMF / Generative AI Profile
use: Govern, map, measure, manage framing; provenance and TEVV concepts.

name: AI Incident Database
use: Real-world AI harm reports and incident taxonomies.

use: Incident classification by risk, cause, harm, severity, and related dimensions.

name: BIPIA
use: Benchmark for indirect prompt injection in external content.

name: Mozilla.ai Guardrail Benchmarking
use: Evidence that prompt-injection guardrails and function-call malfunction detection need separate evaluation.

name: Curated Social Streams

name: X API Recent Search
use: Credential-gated collection of recent public Posts matching risk-intelligence queries.
